targets.agent_summary: Reviewed `src/packed/tests.rs`, which is a pure Rust test module defining packed-search test cases, configuration macros, and assertion helpers for `aho-corasick`. I found no concrete indicators of install-time execution, network/exfiltration, credential access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation, or persistence in this file.

Reviewed `src/buffer.rs`, which is a small stream-search roll buffer that allocates a fixed `Vec<u8>`, fills it from an `io::Read`, and rolls the retained suffix forward with `ptr::copy`. I checked for install-time hooks, network/exfiltration, credential access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation, persistence, and other hidden execution paths; none were present in this file.
